name: Intro to Stick Skills

activities: Jog with ball - free dribble in grid
Dynamic stretches: high knees, butt kicks, side shuffles with stick
Recap: what did we learn today?

coachNotes: First session — establish routines and expectations. Focus on FUN and positive reinforcement. Don't over-correct technique yet.

name: Passing & Communication

activities: Partner passing on the move across the grid
Dynamic stretches with ball: lunges with push pass
Home assignment: 50 wall passes each night

coachNotes: Introduce the wall pass homework. Explain that solo practice at home builds skills faster than team sessions alone.

name: Receiving Under Pressure

activities: Ball mastery: toe taps, rolls, pull-backs
Recap: why is first touch important?

coachNotes: Build on week 1 passing. Now focus on what happens AFTER you receive — the turn and next action.

name: Movement & Space

activities: Dynamic movement: sprints, backpedal, lateral shuffles

coachNotes: Concept of creating space. 'If you want the ball, move to where the ball ISN'T.' Leads and timing.

name: Defending Fundamentals
coachNotes: First tackling session. Emphasize: tackle the ball, NOT the player. Patience is the #1 defensive skill.

name: Attack vs Defence

activities: Passing gates: pass through cones to partner

coachNotes: Connect passing, movement, and decision-making into game-like scenarios. Celebrate creativity and teamwork over individual skill.

name: Shooting & Scoring

activities: Recap: hitting the target, low and hard

coachNotes: First dedicated shooting session. Emphasize technique over power. Hit the target. Low + accurate > high + wild.

name: Attacking Combos
coachNotes: Combine all attacking skills: movement, passing, receiving, shooting. Build toward match play.

name: Full Skills Circuit

activities: Self-assessment: what's your best skill? What needs work?

coachNotes: Review week. Stations format — 4 stations, rotate every 8 minutes. Assess individual progress informally.

name: Small-Sided Games

activities: Recap: what did you do well in the games?

coachNotes: Let them play! Minimal stoppages. Coach through questions, not instructions. 'What did you see? What could you do next time?'

name: Match Preparation

activities: Match warm-up routine: jog, dynamic stretches, passing pairs, shooting
Team talk: roles and positions for the match

coachNotes: Practice the pre-match warm-up they'll use on game day. Brief positional orientation. Keep it simple: where to stand at start.

name: Game Day & Celebration

activities: What will you practice over the break?

coachNotes: Final session: full match play (modified rules for fun). Celebrate every player. Hand out achievement cards. Set goals for next season.
